citation: ASC Code of Ethics — Article II (Identification of advertising and sponsored content)
summary: Sponsored content, endorsements, and influencer advertising must be clearly identifiable as paid commercial communications.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Influencer posts, brand partnerships, or native advertising without clear sponsorship identification. ACTION: REWRITE — add conspicuous ad disclosure. CHECK: #ad, paid partnership labels, and platform-native disclosure. ESCALATE IF: Deceptive omission of material sponsorship.
